The '''''Daedlus''''' was a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] that served with the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]'' {{1st}} {{C|Simulator appearance only}}
